Text: Hello Wayfair Team, Thank you for sending notification of the situation. We have reached out to the supplier regarding this issue and they have confirmed that this order will receive additional packaging to ensure safe delivery to the customer. Thank you,

Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out. I'm happy to address this for you today. This is not yet a multiple damages situation. The customer received their original order, which arrived damaged. A replacement has been issued. If possible, please overpack the replacement PO # to avoid further damage. Thanks again for reaching out. I am marking this ticket as complete. If you need further support with this issue, please comment to re-open. Thank you,

Hello Wayfair Team, Thank you for reaching out. In review of this order, I’m showing that it’s already been shipped by the supplier. We could not confirm if additional packaging was applied to the shipment prior to it leaving the warehouse. We do apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. Thanks again for reaching out. I am marking this ticket as complete. If you need further support with this issue, please comment to re-open. Thank you,

Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out. I'm happy to address this for you today. Our mutual customer has received their order damaged. To improve the customer experience please do whatever is necessary to over-pack this next shipment. This may include: The use of additional Styrofoam or other packaging materials inside the box (to further immobilize and protect the product inside) Over-box V-board on all outside edges of the box Foam corners Other methods as needed. The Wayfair Help Center provides an outline of packing standards in the following article: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/2387 Please confirm that additional packing materials will be used for PO#. Thank you,
Hello [supplier name], Wayfair appreciates your assistance in improving the customer experience. Please confirm if you are able to accommodate this overpack request. Thank you,

Hello Wayfair Team, Thank you for reaching out. This concern has been discussed with the supplier and they have explained that they're not able to over pack, however, they will do everything possible to ensure the item ships safely to the customer. Thank you,

Hello Wayfair Team, Thank you for sending notification of the situation. We have reached out to the supplier but were unable to confirm if the PO was able to be overpacked. Please work with the customer to provide an alternative solution. Thank you,

Hello Wayfair Team, Thank you for reaching out on this. Please note that this request type is limited to providing support on if a PO needs to overpacked due to instances of the original and first replacement PO being damaged. This ticket will be closed as the request is out of scope. If additional support is required on this request, please submit a new request on the suppliers behalf in Partner Home utilizing the following request path: Help & Support > Submit a Ticket > Dropship Order Fulfillment > Problem Fulfilling an Order > General Fulfillment Help Thank you,
